lean_declaration:
theorem binom_sym (n k : ℕ) (hk : k ≤ n) : (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) = (Nat.choose n (n - k) : ℝ) := by
  exact_mod_cast (Nat.choose_symm hk).symm
notes: The original generated proof used Nat.choose_symm hk directly, but that lemma gives the reversed equality, so we used .symm and then exact_mod_cast.
